cause: The V70 runtime allowlist omitted ranker_excess_rms although the frozen policy requires raw excess returns in the same units as transition costs and the 0.002 switch hurdle.
remediation: Extract only the three preexisting fold ranker_excess_rms values into a hash-bound receipt, preserve their V63 fold-scale identities, add that receipt to the V70 runtime allowlist, and re-anchor prospective admissibility to the first commit containing the exact amendment file.
